steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '01.083.200/0001-18' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31' AND EXERC_ORDER = 'Último' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC, ACCOUNT_NUMBER ASC LIMIT 1000;"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT * FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '01.083.200/0001-18' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC LIMIT 1;"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
